name: dgxsparklabs-hook-example-pretooluse
description: Single-event reference hook for PreToolUse, scoped to Write|Edit. Before the tool runs, appends a timestamped marker plus the full hook JSON payload (read from stdin) to /tmp/hook-fired-pretooluse.log. The payload carries the tool name and tool input — read it from stdin JSON, NOT from a CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME env var (which is not populated).
